mechanism_narrative: Sustained month-over-month payroll growth above 150,000 persons signals robust labor market demand and future consumption capacity, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days through improved earnings expectations.
evidence_refs: fact:June 2015 payroll level at 130,996k suggests ongoing expansion
regime_hint: post-crisis recovery with sustained job creation
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive payroll growth months produce negative 20-day forward returns in > 55% of instances.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rate remains near zero (below 0.25%) while inflation measured by CPIAUCSL stays below 2.5%, indicating monetary accommodation that suppresses equity risk premiums and sustains positive equity valuations over 60 trading days.
regime_hint: zero lower bound monetary policy with subdued inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60-day returns in > 50% of triggered instances, or the joint effect of low rates and low inflation shows Rank IC < 0.05 when tested separately from single-variable models.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts measured by HOUST decline by more than 10% month-over-month, signaling weakening construction demand and forward-looking economic contraction that depresses S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as investors reprrice growth expectations.
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with potential demand softening
failure_condition: Housing declines > 10% MoM produce positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production measured by INDPRO falls below 99.0 index level, indicating contraction in manufacturing capacity utilization and forward supply constraints that reduce corporate profitability and drive negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO < 99.0 produces positive 20-day returns in > 55% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales measured by RSAFS and housing starts measured by HOUST both decline simultaneously by more than 5% month-over-month, indicating synchronized contraction in consumer and construction demand that signals imminent economic slowdown and negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 5% MoM AND HOUST declines > 5% MoM
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with synchronized demand weakness
failure_condition: Synchronized declines in both RSAFS and HOUST produce positive 60-day returns in > 50% of instances, or interaction term shows no statistical significance (p > 0.10) when tested against single-variable models.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate measured by UNRATE rises above 5.5% while payroll growth measured by PAYEMS decelerates below 100,000 persons monthly, indicating labor market deterioration that signals earnings risk and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 20 trading days.
regime_hint: late-cycle labor market with deteriorating momentum
failure_condition: Joint condition triggers produce positive 20-day returns in > 55% of instances, or the interaction effect is not statistically significant (p > 0.10) when tested against additive single-variable models.

mechanism_narrative: Real interest rates measured as FEDFUNDS minus CPIAUCSL YoY inflation turn positive and rise above 1.5%, indicating monetary tightening that increases equity discount rates and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days as valuations compress.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with rising real rates
failure_condition: Real rate threshold crossings produce negative 60-day returns in < 50% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP measured by GDPC1 grows at an annualized rate below 2.0% in the most recent quarter, indicating subtrend economic growth that constrains corporate earnings and produces negative S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days as growth expectations reset downward.
regime_hint: subtrend growth expansion with earnings pressure
failure_condition: Subtrend GDP growth produces positive 5-day returns in > 60% of instances, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 18-month rolling window.
